description: Free/local-first domino workflow: each switchboard step routes through local tools or AgentBus, adds compact bullets, then triggers the next step.

steps.title: Check the free/local bus field
success_bullets: Verified the local/free provider field before routing work.
Confirmed whether offline, Ollama, Hugging Face, and Kaggle surfaces are usable.

steps.title: Route the goal into a bounded work packet
steps.task: Turn the current user goal into a bounded free/local AgentBus work packet. Preserve prior bullets, identify the next concrete file/tool surface, and avoid paid model APIs.
success_bullets: Converted the goal into a bounded AgentBus work packet.

steps.title: Review the packet for failure modes
steps.task: Review the prior work packet for missing tests, unsafe routing, unclear outputs, and utility gaps. Return only concrete improvement bullets.
success_bullets: Reviewed the route for tests, safety, utility, and handoff gaps.

steps.title: Capture the run as training/evaluation material
steps.task: Convert the prior route and review bullets into training/evaluation material for the operator_agent_bus lane. Keep it as metadata and next-action bullets, not raw secrets.
success_bullets: Captured the run shape as operator-agent-bus training/evaluation material.
Preserved compact receipts instead of raw sensitive text.

steps.title: Fallback repair route
steps.task: A previous switchboard step failed. Produce a local-only repair plan with the failed step id, likely cause, and smallest next command to restore the domino chain.
success_bullets: Generated a local-only repair plan for the failed switchboard step.
